name: minsky
description: An integration distribution for autonomous Claude Code on Max5.

scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage
scripts.dogfood:status: launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep -i minsky || systemctl --user status minsky-supervisor.target 2>/dev/null
scripts.dogfood:stop: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.minsky.tick-loop.plist 2>/dev/null; launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.minsky.budget-guard.plist 2>/dev/null; systemctl --user stop minsky-supervisor.target 2>/dev/null; echo 'supervisor stopped'
